info.title: apollokit Client API
info.description:
apollokit is a multi-tenant game-SaaS backend. Routes are split into

- **Admin** (`/api/<module>/...`): used by SaaS operators from the admin dashboard. Authenticate with a Better Auth session cookie or an admin API key (`x-api-key: ak_…`).
- **Client** (`/api/client/<module>/...`): consumed by tenant frontends on behalf of end users. Authenticate with a client publishable key (`x-api-key: cpk_…`). End-user-scoped routes additionally require `x-end-user-id` and `x-user-hash` headers — `x-user-hash` is HMAC-SHA256(endUserId, decrypted csk_) hex, computed by the client SDK at runtime.

Every business endpoint returns the standard envelope `{ code, data, message, requestId }`. Success uses `code: "ok"` and the payload in `data`. Validation errors use HTTP 400 and `code: "validation_error"`. Domain errors use the module-specific `code` (e.g. `check_in.config_not_found`) at their declared HTTP status. Better Auth routes (`/api/auth/*`, `/api/client/auth/*`) keep the third-party library's native format.

tierCode.description: 档位 code。[a-z0-9-_] 开头 [a-z0-9-_]。约定 'free' 为免费档。

unlocked.description: Entry ids that were newly unlocked by this sync.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.
Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

code.description: Human-readable form with dashes, e.g. ABCD-EFGH

joinMode.description: open = anyone can join, request = approval needed, closed = no new members.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

joinMode.description: open = anyone can join, request = approval needed, closed = no new members.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

poolId.description: The lottery pool to pull from.

eventData.description: Arbitrary event payload. Used by event_value counting.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the event. Defaults to now if omitted.

processed.description: Number of task definitions that matched and were updated.

includeHidden.description: Include tasks whose prerequisites are not met.

taskId.description: Task definition id whose tier is being claimed.

tierAlias.description: Stable alias of the reward tier to claim.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

newLeaderUserId.description: The new leader's end user id.

status.description: New team status. Cannot set to 'dissolved' — use dissolve endpoint.

stars.description: Number of stars earned on this clear (0 if omitted).

type.description: What to claim: 'clear' for clear rewards, 'star' for a star reward tier.

starTier.description: The star count of the tier to claim. Required when type='star'.

rewardTiers.description: Staged reward tier definitions configured for this task.

claimedTierAliases.description: Tier aliases the user has already claimed this period. Stale (past-period) rows are excluded.

assignment.description: Present when the task has visibility='assigned' and the user has an active assignment. Null otherwise.

alias.description: Stable identifier for this tier, unique within the task. Used as the idempotency key on the claim ledger — keeping it stable lets admins add/remove/reorder tiers without invalidating prior claims.

threshold.description: currentValue >= threshold makes this tier claimable. Must be <= targetValue.

rewards.description: Rewards granted when this tier is claimed.

route.description: One of the registered internal routes. See LINK_ROUTE_REGISTRY.

oneOf.description: Navigate to a registered in-app route. Params are validated per-route against the schema declared in LINK_ROUTE_REGISTRY.

code.description: 档位 code。[a-z0-9-_] 开头 [a-z0-9-_]。约定 'free' 为免费档。

requiresTier.description: 档位 code。[a-z0-9-_] 开头 [a-z0-9-_]。约定 'free' 为免费档。

kind.description: 'modal' = one-shot popup on app start; 'feed' = persistent list item; 'ticker' = scrolling short-text banner. Clients decide how to render.

severity.description: Visual tone hint for the client — info / warning / urgent.

ClientCredential.name: x-api-key
ClientCredential.description: Client publishable key (`cpk_…` prefix) sent in the `x-api-key` request header. End-user-scoped routes additionally require `x-end-user-id` and `x-user-hash` headers — `x-user-hash` is HMAC-SHA256(endUserId, decrypted csk_) hex, computed at runtime by the client SDK and not declared as a separate security scheme.
